name: FIBRA PURA TELECOM
notes:
We operate mainly for the residential public in Goiânia-Goiás-Brazil.

We care about network security first.

We participate and encourage the adoption of DDoS mitigation solutions - Unwanted Traffic Removal Service provided by TeamCymru.

We discard prefixes marked with BLACKHOLE (rfc7999).

We accept peering from all CDNs, clouds, Government and Education. Other cases are considered at our convenience and that of our clients as well.

Requests for information about our customers will only be answered under Brazilian jurisdiction.
